"use client"; import { useState, FormEvent } from "react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { ArrowRight, Cpu, Target, Zap, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; export default function Contact() { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ fullName: "", companyName: "", emailAddress: "", website: "", projectType: "", projectScale: "", budget: "", projectGoals: "" }); const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false); const [isSubmitted, setIsSubmitted] = useState(false); const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); }; const isFormValid = formData.fullName && formData.emailAddress && formData.projectType && formData.projectScale && formData.projectGoals; const handleSubmit = async (e: FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); if (!isFormValid) return; setIsSubmitting(true); // Simulate premium API pipeline processing delay await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500)); setIsSubmitting(false); setIsSubmitted(true); }; return (

Escape the
Template Economy.

The digital world is saturated with "good enough."
We don't build "good enough."

At YBB, every system begins with a blank canvas and a purpose-built architecture. No recycled themes. No patched plugins. Just original, high-performance infrastructure engineered specifically for your business.

{/* Generic is Expensive Callout */}

Generic is Expensive.

Templates cost you differentiation, performance, and long-term flexibility. Custom infrastructure compounds over time.

{/* SECTION 3: The Pixel-Perfect Promise */}
{/* Subtle engineering grid background */}

Intentionality in
Every Coordinate.

Every pixel is placed with purpose. From typography weight to motion physics, your interface is engineered to feel precise, intuitive, and enduring.

If it doesn't feel intentional, it isn't finished.
{/* SECTION 4: The YBB Infrastructure Logic */}

Design That Scales.
Infrastructure That Lasts.

Custom DNA

Every line of Next.js code is written to match your exact business logic.

Performance First

No plugin overload. No unnecessary layers. Just optimized speed and clean architecture.
